bead.title: Stage 4.17: CRITICAL final spec consistency audit
bead.description: Verification bead. Run: `grep -riE '(react|vite|tanstack|react-router|minisearch|MSW|frontend/dist|npm install|pnpm)' docs/ library/ website/ CLAUDE.md README.md cli/ .github/ lefthook.yml 2>/dev/null`. Paste full output into completion note. Classify every match as (a) historical/superseded OK, (b) intentional with justification, or (c) stale MUST fix. Delete docs/plan-svelte-migration.md (the temporary plan doc). See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #51.
bead.acceptance: (1) Completion note contains complete grep output. (2) Every match classified. (3) Zero category-(c) matches at close. (4) docs/plan-svelte-migration.md is deleted in this bead's commit.

events.body: Same allowlist as bead ddx-2c0c754d. When running the final spec consistency audit at this bead, SD-022-gql-svelte-migration.md legitimately references the old stack for historical / deletion-target framing. Classify matches in that file as category (a) historical-OK.
events.source: allowlist note from SD-022 opus review
events.summary: Allowlist SD-022 intentional historical refs when running the final audit
